finding_results.notes: Kept the early dresser-mirror manifestation as the chapter's single witnessed mirror memory. Removed the later second mirror image from the public reckoning and let the escalation ride on the front window and enamel coffee pot instead.
finding_results.summary: The mirror now shows one witnessed dust-memory only, preserving the established one-surface rule while keeping the chapter's public revelation intact.

summary: Resolved the packet's high-severity craft issue by eliminating the mirror's second distinct witnessed memory during the auction climax and preserving the scene's proof cascade through other surfaces.
